name: design-component
description: Design a component before implementation using AEM Edge Delivery content-driven workflow.
argument-hint: <block-name>
---

# Design Component

Design the component passed as argument and prepare it for implementation in AEM Edge Delivery Services.

## Input

- Block name: {{block_name}}

## Instructions

You are working in an AEM Edge Delivery Services project.

Using Skill: content-driven-development

Apply the workflow as a design-first task and do not start JS/CSS implementation yet.

### Required execution
1. Read AGENTS.md and follow project rules.
2. Use content-driven-development to structure the work, focused on analysis and design.
3. Define acceptance criteria for this component.
4. Propose content model for authors (fields, order, required/optional, examples).
5. Propose 2 to 3 visual directions aligned with existing site styles.
6. Choose one recommended direction and explain why.
7. Provide responsive behavior for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
8. Provide accessibility requirements (heading order, alt text, keyboard/focus, contrast).
9. Provide motion/interaction rules (if any) with performance constraints.
10. Return an implementation-ready checklist for phase 2 (HTML structure, JS responsibilities, CSS responsibilities, tests).

### Required output format
Return:
1. Component summary
2. Acceptance criteria
3. Authoring content model
4. Visual directions (2 to 3)
5. Recommended direction
6. Responsive rules
7. Accessibility rules
8. Interaction/motion rules
9. Phase 2 implementation checklist
10. Risks and open questions
